name: gitea
title: Gitea
description: Check your notifications and manage issues and pull requests.
author: mitsimi

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Gitea URL
preferences.description: URL to your Gitea instance, eg. https://cloud.gitea.com.

preferences.name: accessToken
preferences.title: Access Token
preferences.description: Your Gitea Access Token

preferences.name: dateFormat
preferences.title: Date Format
preferences.description: The date format to use in the UI.

preferences.name: editorVSCode
preferences.title: Clone Editors
preferences.description: Show Visual Studio Code in clone actions
preferences.label: Visual Studio Code

preferences.name: editorCursor
preferences.description: Show Cursor in clone actions
preferences.label: Cursor

preferences.name: editorZed
preferences.description: Show Zed in clone actions
preferences.label: Zed

preferences.name: editorIntelliJ
preferences.description: Show IntelliJ IDEA in clone actions
preferences.label: IntelliJ IDEA

preferences.name: cloneProtocol
preferences.title: Clone Protocol
preferences.description: Protocol to use for clone-with-editor actions

commands.name: issue-mine
commands.title: My Issues
commands.subtitle: Gitea
commands.description: List issues created by you, assigned to you, or mentioning you

preferences.name: includeCreated
preferences.description: Show issues you created
preferences.label: Created
preferences.title: Categories to Display

preferences.name: includeAssigned
preferences.description: Show issues assigned to you
preferences.label: Assigned

preferences.name: includeMentioned
preferences.description: Show issues where you are mentioned
preferences.label: Mentioned

preferences.name: includeRecentlyClosed
preferences.description: Include closed issues in selected categories
preferences.label: Include Closed

commands.name: notifications-menu-bar
commands.title: Notifications Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Gitea
commands.description: Show unread notification count in menu bar

commands.name: my-pull-requests
commands.title: My Pull Requests
commands.subtitle: Gitea
commands.description: List pull requests created by you, assigned to you, or mentioning you

preferences.name: includeCreated
preferences.description: Show pull requests you created
preferences.label: Created
preferences.title: Categories to Display

preferences.name: includeOwnedRepositories
preferences.description: Show pull requests in repositories you own
preferences.label: Owned Repositories

preferences.name: includeAccessibleRepositories
preferences.description: Show pull requests in all repositories your account can access
preferences.label: Accessible Repositories

preferences.name: includeAssigned
preferences.description: Show pull requests assigned to you
preferences.label: Assigned

preferences.name: includeReviewRequested
preferences.description: Show pull requests where you are requested to review
preferences.label: Review Requests

preferences.name: includeReviewed
preferences.description: Show pull requests you reviewed
preferences.label: Reviewed

preferences.name: includeMentioned
preferences.description: Show pull requests where you are mentioned
preferences.label: Mentioned

preferences.name: includeRecentlyClosed
preferences.description: Include closed pull requests in selected categories
preferences.label: Include Closed

commands.name: issue-create
commands.title: Create Issue
commands.subtitle: Gitea
commands.description: Create an issue in a repository

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run check:type && npm run test
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
